HomeFAQ.title: Have Questions? We've Got Answers.
HomeFAQ.subtitle: A quick look at some common queries about Backsure's solutions and services.
HomeFAQ.q1: What types of businesses do you support?
HomeFAQ.a1: From early-stage startups to enterprises, across all industries. Our flexible service models allow us to tailor our approach to your specific needs, regardless of your company size or sector.
HomeFAQ.q2: How does your pricing structure work?
HomeFAQ.a2: Monthly billing. Flexible terms. Fully customized quotes. We offer transparent pricing based on the service model you choose and the level of support required, allowing for predictable budgeting without unnecessary overhead.
HomeFAQ.q3: What makes Backsure different from other providers?
HomeFAQ.a3: We’re a partner—not just a service vendor. Measurable results and growth-focused. Unlike traditional outsourcing companies, we position ourselves as a strategic partner focused on your business growth with a results-driven approach that evolves with your needs.
HomeFAQ.a4: 1–2 week onboarding depending on complexity. Faster for urgent needs. We begin with a thorough assessment, followed by process mapping and team alignment. For urgent requirements, we can expedite certain services while completing the full onboarding process.
HomeFAQ.q5: How do you ensure data security?
HomeFAQ.a5: Global security protocols, encryption, and strict confidentiality measures. We implement industry-standard security practices and can adapt to your specific requirements, providing detailed documentation of our security measures upon request.

About.intro: BSG Support is a new-age backend support company offering dedicated virtual teams to businesses across sectors — from startups to growing enterprises. We handle data processing, admin support, CRM management, recruitment coordination, and recurring tasks. Our teams are trained to integrate smoothly into your workflows and deliver results from day one.

meta.title: Frequently Asked Questions
meta.description: Get answers to common questions about our services

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.subtitle: Get answers to common questions about our services

FAQ.q1: What is a Dedicated Virtual Team?
FAQ.a1: A group of professionals who work exclusively for your company but operate remotely. They function as an extension of your organization, handling specific backend tasks and integrating seamlessly with your existing workflows and systems. Unlike freelancers, they focus solely on your business needs.
FAQ.q2: How to choose the right outsourcing partner for your backend operations?
FAQ.a2: Define your specific operational needs and goals. Research potential firms and assess their expertise in your industry. Consider cultural fit and scalability options. Verify quality assurance and data security measures. Evaluate support services and response times. Align costs with your budget and request case studies or client references.
FAQ.q3: What are the pros and cons of working with a dedicated virtual team?
FAQ.a3: Pros include cost efficiency (40-60% savings vs. local hiring), access to a global talent pool, easy scalability, reduced administrative burden, and time zone advantages. Cons can include communication challenges across time zones, initial setup investment, and less direct day-to-day oversight. At BSG, we actively address these through communication protocols, thorough onboarding, and cultural training.
FAQ.q4: What roles are typically included in a dedicated backend support team?
FAQ.a4: Common roles include Data Entry Specialists, Administrative Assistants, CRM Managers, Virtual Assistants, Recruitment Coordinators, Document Processors, Customer Support Representatives, and Research Analysts.
FAQ.q5: How do you ensure data security when working with an outsourced team?
FAQ.a5: We enforce strict NDAs and confidentiality agreements, secure access controls and authentication protocols, regular security training, monitored network infrastructure, compliance with data protection regulations, regular security audits, secure file sharing platforms, and data encryption for sensitive information.
FAQ.q6: What industries do you primarily serve?
FAQ.a6: We serve Insurance (policy administration, claims processing), Finance & Banking (transaction processing, compliance), Healthcare (records management, billing), Real Estate (listing management, document processing), E-commerce (order processing, inventory), Technology (administrative support, onboarding), and Professional Services (CRM administration, research).
FAQ.q7: How do you handle the onboarding process for new clients?
FAQ.a7: Our 8-step process: Discovery discussions, Team Assembly with the right skills, System Setup for tools and access, Comprehensive Training, a Pilot Phase to refine processes, a Feedback Loop with regular check-ins, gradual Scale Up, and Ongoing Support with continuous quality checks.
FAQ.a8: We offer transparent, monthly billing with no hidden fees. Pricing is based on the service model you choose — Dedicated Teams, On-Demand Support, or Business Care Plans — and scales with the size and scope of your requirements. There are no long-term lock-in contracts; we keep terms simple and flexible so you can adjust as your business evolves. Contact us for a custom quote tailored to your needs.
FAQ.q9: Why choose Backsure Global Support over other outsourcing providers?
FAQ.a9: BSG is built as a strategic partner, not a transactional vendor. We combine dedicated teams from our delivery centers in India and the United Arab Emirates with a hands-on, relationship-driven approach. Every engagement starts with deep process mapping, and we assign professionals who are trained specifically for your workflows. Our flexible service models, transparent pricing, and continuous performance monitoring set us apart from generic outsourcing firms.
FAQ.a10: We operate from two global delivery centers: our UAE office at Paradise Building, Barsha Heights, Dubai, and our India office at Corporate Court, #108 Infantry Road, Bangalore. This dual-location setup gives us time zone coverage, cost efficiency, and access to a diverse, skilled talent pool — allowing us to serve clients across the Middle East, Asia, Europe, and beyond.

meta.title: Data Security
meta.description: How Backsure Global Support protects your information with a multi-layered security approach.

hero.title: Data Security at Backsure Global Support
hero.subtitle: Protecting Your Information with Confidence

DataSecurity.intro: Managing business operations often involves handling sensitive, confidential data. We take a multi-layered security approach combining legal safeguards, digital protections, and physical access control. Every client engagement begins with a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA), and all team members sign individual confidentiality agreements.

digital.title: Digital Security
digital.item4: Aligned with UAE PDPL and GCC privacy laws

physical.title: Physical Security
physical.item3: Controlled device usage in work areas

accessProtocols.title: Platform Access Protocols
accessProtocols.item1: Dedicated user credentials with role-limited access
accessProtocols.item3: No unauthorized downloads or local storage
accessProtocols.item4: Immediate access revocation upon role change or offboarding
accessProtocols.item5: Regular access reviews and permission audits

secureStorage.title: Secure Storage
secureStorage.desc: Encrypted formats with multiple security layers to prevent unauthorized access.

accessControl.title: Access Control
accessControl.desc: Strict role-based access — only authorized members can view or process specific data.

regularAudits.title: Regular Audits
regularAudits.desc: Scheduled security audits to verify compliance and identify potential vulnerabilities.

dataDestruction.title: Data Destruction
dataDestruction.desc: Upon request or project completion, permanently delete client data with verification certificates.

technical.title: Technical Security
technical.desc: Industry-leading encryption, secure networks, and advanced threat monitoring systems to protect your data at every level.

personnel.title: Personnel Security
personnel.desc: Rigorous background checks for all staff, regular security training, and strict access policies to ensure human-level protection.

compliance.title: Compliance Framework
compliance.desc: Fully aligned with UAE PDPL and GCC privacy laws, with continuous monitoring and adaptation to evolving regulatory requirements.

cta.title: A Reliable Partner in Data Protection
cta.desc: Backsure Global Support ensures your information is safe, confidential, and always handled with integrity.

uiux.desc: Portal redesign, dashboard revamps, workflow optimization, admin system modernization, and self-service platform improvements — delivering a better experience for insurance brokers, support teams, and operations-heavy businesses.

dataReporting.title: Data & Reporting Solutions
dataReporting.desc: KPI dashboards, performance tracking tools, SLA reporting, finance dashboards, claims and operations analytics, and custom reporting systems — giving decision-makers the visibility they need.

integration.title: System Integration Support
integration.desc: CRM integration, payment gateway connections, WhatsApp and API integration, accounting system linking, document platform connections, and lead management integration — removing business friction across your tech stack.

endToEnd.title: End-to-End Capability
endToEnd.desc: From initial development through maintenance, automation, and reporting — get a single partner for your entire technology lifecycle.

businessFirst.title: Business-First Approach
businessFirst.desc: We don't just write code — we solve business problems with technology, combining operational expertise with development capability.

recurringPartnership.title: Recurring Partnership Model
recurringPartnership.desc: Beyond one-time builds, we offer ongoing support, maintenance, and feature enhancement — creating a partnership that evolves with your business.

audience.a1: Insurance brokers and aggregators needing portal and workflow solutions
audience.a2: Operations-heavy businesses looking to automate manual processes
audience.a3: Companies seeking ongoing application support and maintenance
audience.a4: Organizations wanting to modernize legacy systems and dashboards

cta.headline: Technology That Drives Business Forward
cta.text: Partner with BSG for custom development, automation, and ongoing support — all from one team that understands your operations.

meta.title: Our Team
meta.description: Meet the team behind Backsure Global Support.

hero.title: Meet the Team
hero.subtitle: Our strength lies in our people. We bring together driven professionals who are passionate about simplifying operations and driving growth for our clients.

leader1.bio: Brings deep experience in supporting fast-scaling startups and enterprises, with expertise across backend operations, outsourcing models, and team building.

Team.departmentsSubtitle: Behind every successful client partnership is a structured team of specialists working across key business functions.

operations.title: Operations Team
operations.desc: Our operations specialists handle day-to-day delivery across insurance, finance, HR, and compliance — ensuring accuracy, consistency, and speed for every client engagement.

clientSuccess.title: Client Success Team
clientSuccess.desc: Dedicated relationship managers who serve as your single point of contact, ensuring seamless onboarding, clear communication, and continuous improvement.

technology.title: Technology & Systems
technology.desc: Our tech team manages secure infrastructure, CRM integrations, and automation tools that enable efficient workflows and real-time collaboration with clients.

hr.title: HR & Talent Acquisition
hr.desc: Responsible for sourcing, training, and retaining top talent — ensuring every team member we place meets the highest professional standards.

cta.title: Want to Join Our Team?
cta.desc: We're always looking for talented individuals who share our passion for operational excellence.

meta.title: Testimonials
meta.description: What our clients say about Backsure Global Support.

hero.title: What Our Clients Say
hero.subtitle: We take pride in being a growth partner to every client we work with. Here's what some of them have to say.

t1.quote: BSG Support helped us streamline our insurance operations. Their dedicated support model made it feel like they were part of our in-house team.

t2.quote: From payroll to compliance support, their team has been a reliable extension of our business. Transparent, efficient, and truly scalable.

t3.quote: We needed a partner who could handle our back-office without constant supervision. BSG delivered exactly that — reliable, consistent, and always ahead of deadlines.

t4.quote: Their onboarding process was seamless. Within two weeks, the BSG team was fully integrated into our CRM and handling client queries as if they had been with us for years.

t5.quote: What sets BSG apart is their ownership mindset. They don't just execute tasks — they proactively identify improvements and suggest better workflows.

t6.quote: Outsourcing our HR operations to BSG was one of the best decisions we made. Payroll accuracy improved and our team could finally focus on strategic initiatives.

Testimonials.industriesSubtitle: Our clients span multiple sectors, and we bring the same level of dedication and expertise to every partnership.

cta.title: Ready to become our next success story?
cta.desc: Let's discuss how our dedicated teams can help your business grow.

meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: Backsure Global Support privacy policy.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.intro: At Backsure Global Support, we are committed to protecting and respecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information.
PrivacyPolicy.infoCollect: We may collect personal information such as your name, email address, phone number, and company details when you fill out our contact forms, subscribe to our newsletter, or use our services.
PrivacyPolicy.howWeUse1: To provide and improve our services
PrivacyPolicy.howWeUse2: To communicate with you about your inquiries
PrivacyPolicy.howWeUse3: To send updates about our services (with your consent)
PrivacyPolicy.dataSecurity: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. See our <link>Data Security</link> page for details.
PrivacyPolicy.thirdParty: We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties except as required to provide our services or comply with legal requirements.
PrivacyPolicy.yourRights: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. Contact us at {email} to exercise these rights.
PrivacyPolicy.contact: For questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at {email}.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.intro: Welcome to Backsure Global Support. By using our website and services, you agree to the following terms and conditions.
Terms.services: Backsure Global Support provides backend operational support services including but not limited to dedicated teams, on-demand support, and business care plans. Service details and scope are defined in individual client agreements.
Terms.use: This website is provided for informational purposes. You agree not to misuse the website or its content, including attempting unauthorized access to our systems.
Terms.ip: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, and images, is the property of Backsure Global Support and is protected by copyright laws.
Terms.liability: Backsure Global Support shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our website or services.
Terms.law: These terms are governed by the laws of the United Arab Emirates. Any disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the courts of Dubai.
Terms.contact: For questions about these terms, please contact us at <email>info@backsureglobalsupport.com</email>.

meta.title: Team Efficiency Calculator | Backsure Global Support
meta.description: Calculate your team efficiency savings with BSG. Discover how outsourcing operational tasks can reduce costs and improve productivity for your insurance or finance team.

Calculator.heroDesc: Discover how much you could save by outsourcing your back-office operations to BSG. Our calculator analyses your current costs and shows you the potential savings.
Calculator.getStartedDesc: Select your country and team to begin
Calculator.sub0: Select your country and operational team
Calculator.sub1: Define role level, team size, and process maturity
Calculator.sub2: Review and customise your cost structure
Calculator.sub3: Adjust how time is allocated across tasks
Calculator.sub5: Set your optimisation goals and timeline
Calculator.sub6: Enter your details to receive your analysis
Calculator.maturityDesc: This determines the recommended BSG engagement approach
Calculator.taskAllocDesc: Adjust task time allocation for your {team}. Total should be ~100%.
Calculator.contactDesc: Enter your details to receive your personalised analysis. Our team will contact you within 24 hours.
Calculator.companyEmailHint: Company email only (no Gmail, Yahoo, etc.)
Calculator.requiredFields: Please complete all required fields before proceeding.
Calculator.goalNarrative: Based on your diagnostic data, BSG recommends a partnership
Calculator.diagnosticFindingsDesc: Process inefficiencies identified from your team assessment
Calculator.taskHandoverDesc: How responsibilities will be split between BSG and your team
Calculator.taskHandoverNote: Task handover percentages are estimated based on your diagnostic assessment. BSG absorbs administrative and process-heavy tasks, while your team retains strategic decision-making and client-facing responsibilities.
Calculator.financialImpactDesc: Side-by-side cost comparison: current vs. BSG partnership
Calculator.bsgRateNote: BSG rate: {rate}% of base salary (country & role specific). No overhead costs apply to BSG-managed employees.
Calculator.inefficiencyScore: Inefficiency score: Derived from {count} diagnostic questions, weighted by importance, capped at 20% maximum productivity loss.
Calculator.maturityAdjustment: Maturity adjustment: Level {level} ({label}) adds a {modifier}% modifier to productivity loss calculation.
Calculator.savingsRangeNote: Savings range: ±10% of central estimate to account for real-world variability.
Calculator.methodologyDisclaimer: This analysis provides indicative estimates based on self-reported data. Actual results may vary. BSG efficiency guarantees are contractual minimums. Cost categories follow {country} statutory requirements where applicable. Currency: {currency}. All figures are annual unless stated otherwise.
Calculator.submitSuccess: Thank you! Our team will contact you within 24 hours to discuss your optimization opportunities.
Calculator.pdfBsgRecommends: BSG recommends a partnership {narrative} for your {size}-person {team}.
Calculator.pdfDisclaimer: This analysis provides indicative estimates. Actual results may vary.

0.question: How often do follow-ups get missed or delayed?

1.question: Are proposals created from templates or from scratch?

2.question: Is CRM data entry automated or manual?

3.question: How often do meetings need rescheduling due to conflicts?

0.question: How often do case reviews get delayed due to missing information?

1.question: Is application or case data entry automated or manual?

2.question: How often do you re-review the same cases multiple times?

3.question: Are case notes and decisions clearly documented?

4.question: How smooth are handoffs between operations and other teams?

0.question: How often do required documents go missing or get delayed?

1.question: Are request or ticket status updates automated or manual?

2.question: How often do customers chase you for status updates?

3.question: Is document verification done manually or automated?

4.question: How often do requests get delayed due to missing information?

0.question: How quickly do you respond to customer inquiries?

1.question: Is complaint tracking automated or manual?

2.question: How are account or contract changes processed?

3.question: How often do customers repeat the same information to different agents?

0.question: How often do account reconciliations require manual intervention?

1.question: Are financial reports generated automatically or manually?

2.question: How often do payment follow-ups get missed?

3.question: How frequently do invoice errors occur?

4.question: Is expense tracking automated or manual?

0.question: How much time is spent preparing for audits?

2.question: How often do regulatory updates get missed or delayed?

3.question: Do you experience alert fatigue from compliance systems?

4.question: Is regulatory reporting automated or manual?

it_support.name: IT Support & Helpdesk
it_support.description: Ticket handling, system admin, user support

0.question: How quickly are IT support tickets resolved on average?

1.question: Is ticket routing and triage automated or manual?

2.question: How often do users contact IT with repeat or recurring issues?

3.question: Are system access requests processed within agreed timelines?

4.question: Is IT documentation and knowledge base kept up to date?

0.question: How much of HR time is spent on manual data entry vs. strategic work?

options.2: Mostly admin — Little time for strategy

1.question: Is the onboarding process standardised and documented?

2.question: How often do payroll errors or late submissions occur?

3.question: Are job postings and CV screening handled manually?

4.question: Is HR reporting compiled manually from multiple sources?

data_backoffice.name: Data & Back Office
data_backoffice.description: Data entry, document processing, quality checks

0.question: What percentage of data entry is manual vs. automated?

1.question: How often do data errors or rework occur due to manual input?

2.question: How long does document processing take from receipt to completion?

3.question: Are quality checks done manually or through automated validation?

4.question: Is reporting compiled manually from multiple data sources?

UAE.name: United Arab Emirates
UAE.methodologyNote: EOS Gratuity = (Salary÷365)×21 days — UAE Labour Law Article 132.
UAE.bannerText: 🇦🇪 UAE model: flat overhead costs + formula-based EOS Gratuity. No employer social security contributions.

c1.label: Visa & documentation
c1.description: Work permit, entry visa, Emirates ID

c5.label: Office space & utilities
c5.description: Pro-rata desk cost in UAE office

c6.label: End of service gratuity
c6.description: UAE Labour Law — 21 days salary per year

DE.name: Germany
DE.methodologyNote: Germany: statutory social contributions ~22% (pension 9.3% + health 8.15% + unemployment 1.3% + care 1.7% + accident 1% + levies 2%). Ceilings apply per category.
DE.bannerText: 🇩🇪 Germany model: percentage-based statutory social contributions with salary ceilings + flat overhead costs.

UK.name: United Kingdom
UK.methodologyNote: UK: Employer NI 13.8% on earnings above £9,100 threshold + auto-enrolment pension 3% on qualifying band (£6,240–£50,270).
UK.bannerText: 🇬🇧 UK model: Employer National Insurance 13.8% + auto-enrolment pension 3% + flat overhead costs.

c5.label: Office space & utilities
c5.description: Pro-rata desk cost in UK office

SA.name: Saudi Arabia
SA.bannerText: 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia model: flat overhead + EOS Gratuity (15 days/year for first 5 years).

c6.label: Office space & utilities
c6.description: Pro-rata desk cost in KSA office

QA.name: Qatar
QA.methodologyNote: Qatar: EOS Gratuity = (Salary÷365)×21 days per year under Qatar Labour Law.
QA.bannerText: 🇶🇦 Qatar model: flat overhead fees + EOS Gratuity (21 days/year).

US.name: United States
US.methodologyNote: USA: FICA Social Security 6.2% (ceiling $176,100/yr 2025) + Medicare 1.45% (no ceiling) + FUTA max $42/yr.
US.bannerText: 🇺🇸 US model: FICA (Social Security 6.2% + Medicare 1.45%) + FUTA + optional 401(k) match + flat overheads.

c4.label: State Unemployment (SUTA)
c4.description: Varies by state — enter your rate

c5.label: Health insurance
c5.description: No national mandate under 50 FTE; ~$7,500/yr avg

c8.label: Leave salary
c8.description: PTO / annual leave cost (15 days avg)

AU.name: Australia
AU.methodologyNote: Australia: Superannuation Guarantee 11.5% (no ceiling) + workers compensation ~1.5%. No employer health insurance (Medicare is government-funded). No EOS Gratuity.
AU.bannerText: 🇦🇺 Australia model: Superannuation Guarantee 11.5% + workers compensation ~1.5% + flat overheads.

c6.label: Office space & utilities
c6.description: Pro-rata desk cost in Australian office

quality_improvement.label: Quality Improvement
quality_improvement.leadNarrative: focused on improving output quality and consistency

1.label: Basic
1.description: BSG will begin with process documentation and standardisation before optimisation.

2.label: Developing
2.description: BSG will formalise existing processes and introduce automation where gaps exist.

3.label: Mature
3.description: BSG will directly optimise your well-defined processes for peak performance.

4.label: Advanced
4.description: BSG will integrate seamlessly with your advanced processes and focus on marginal gains.
